headline: Senate Reconsiders CLARITY Act Amid $1T Crypto Volatility

headline: Oil Surges 4% on US-Iran Talk Uncertainty

article.title: Oil Holds Biggest Gain in a Month on US-Iran Talk Uncertainty
article.summary: Oil steadied after its biggest gain in about a month, as uncertainty about the state of US-Iran peace talks raised the risk that energy flows from the Persian Gulf could be curtailed for longer.
